title: STEVE'S LAVA CHICKEN from A Minecraft Movie
description: A Minecraft Movie chicken, raw chicken and cooked chicken
body:
(REQUIRES OPTIFINE)



L-L-L-LAVAAAA CH-CH-CH-CHICKEEEEEN


This resource pack turns the cooked chicken item into Steve's lava chicken from the movie. The raw chicken also has a new look, and the chicken itself has a more movie-accurate appearance.


The screenshots for this pack were taken on a map made by sniffercraft34. You can download this amazing, fully functional lava chicken shop here: [https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/steve-s-lava-chicken-from-a-minecraft-movie/](https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/steve-s-lava-chicken-from-a-minecraft-movie/)
